chunks.title: Esther Enters the King's Presence
chunks.reason: Describes Esther approaching the king and receiving the scepter to invite him and Haman to a feast.

chunks.title: The King's Offer and Esther's Delayed Request
chunks.reason: Contains the king repeating his offer of half the kingdom and Esther deferring her specific petition to a second feast.

chunks.title: Haman's Wrath and Counsel
chunks.reason: Narrates Haman's anger at Mordecai, his boasting to friends, and the advice from Zeresh to build a gallows.
